name: Minerva Neurosciences, Inc.
business: Minerva Neurosciences is a clinical-stage biopharmaceutical company focused on the development and commercialization of proprietary product candidates to treat patients suffering from central nervous system diseases. Its lead product candidate, roluperidone, is in development for the treatment of negative symptoms in schizophrenia. The company has not yet received regulatory approval for any product candidate and has not generated revenue from product sales.
sellsTo: Patients suffering from central nervous system diseases

exposures.sentence: We are a clinical-stage biopharmaceutical company focused on the development and commercialization of certain proprietary product candidates to treat patients suffering from central nervous system (CNS) diseases.

catalysts.event: Initiation of C19 Phase 3 confirmatory trial for roluperidone
catalysts.sentence: Subject to ongoing feedback from the FDA, the C19 trial is currently expected to be initiated, including first patient screened, in the second quarter of 2026.

catalysts.event: Topline efficacy results from C19 trial
catalysts.sentence: We currently expect topline efficacy results in the second half of 2027 and relapse assessment data in the second half of 2028.

catalysts.event: Relapse assessment data from C19 trial
catalysts.sentence: We currently expect topline efficacy results in the second half of 2027 and relapse assessment data in the second half of 2028.
